proposals.title: Add Execution Verification Agent to catch silent failures
proposals.verification_notes: IMPLEMENTED 2026-03-13. Created scripts/run-execution-verifier.ts — reads latest sprint JSON, checks each done/approved task deliverable file exists on disk, calls Claude Sonnet for analysis of discrepancies, writes report to reports/cto/execution-verification/YYYY-MM-DD.md. Exit code 1 if discrepancies found.

proposals.title: Add Redis health check to orchestrator startup
proposals.verification_notes: IMPLEMENTED 2026-03-13. Added Redis ping check to orchestrator startup in scripts/orchestrate-agents-v2.ts. Logs OK/not_configured/WARNING. Never aborts sprint. /v1/health Redis check was already implemented in backend/src/routes/health.ts.

proposals.title: Add post-write file integrity check to orchestrator
proposals.verification_notes: IMPLEMENTED 2026-02-15. Added to orchestrate-agents-v2.ts CodingAgent.execute(): pre-write integrity check comparing original vs new line count, 50% threshold (configurable INTEGRITY_THRESHOLD), applies to bugfix tasks + all existing files >10 lines.

proposals.title: Upgrade code fence stripping to handle all MiniMax variants
proposals.verification_notes: IMPLEMENTED 2026-02-15. Enhanced extractCodeBlocks() with broader regex, new stripResidualFences() method applied BEFORE file write. Both supervisor prompts (Claude+Codex) explicitly check for code fences and auto-reject.

proposals.title: Split large frontend files into composable components before task assignment
proposals.verification_notes: PARTIAL 2026-02-15. sidebar.tsx split: 114 lines → sidebar.tsx (53 lines) + sidebar-nav-items.ts (75 lines). api-keys/page.tsx split deferred — no active tasks targeting it.

proposals.title: Implement Sprint-Retrospective Agent
proposals.verification_notes: Superseded by autonomous CTO post-sprint-analysis built into orchestrator Phase 5b (2026-02-15).

proposals.title: Add Sprint-Retrospective Agent to Capture Learnings
proposals.verification_notes: Superseded by autonomous CTO post-sprint-analysis built into orchestrator Phase 5b (2026-02-15).

proposals.title: Add response caching for repeated LLM calls
proposals.verification_notes: Not yet implemented. Redis-backed prompt cache with TTL. V17 local routing may reduce need — re-evaluate after 2 weeks of V17 data.

proposals.title: Enhance Execution-Verifier to Monitor Agent Health
proposals.verification_notes: Not yet implemented. Execution-verifier script exists (II-001) but monitors file existence only, not agent health. Enhancement: add check for agents with empty output for 2+ consecutive sprints, pending task >1hr alert.

proposals.title: Debug Backend-Core Execution Blocker
proposals.verification_notes: CLOSED 2026-03-14. No longer relevant. V17 sprint rewired model routing — backend-core now routes via ClawRouter/Ollama, not MiniMax. Blocker was MiniMax-specific and has been fully bypassed.

proposals.title: Verify OpenClaw v2026.2.12 for Pipeline Fixes
proposals.verification_notes: CLOSED 2026-03-14. Superseded by CTO-20260221-001 (OpenClaw upgrade check). Use that proposal going forward.

proposals.title: Investigate SDK-200 quality gate failure - score 15 auto-approved
proposals.verification_notes: CLOSED 2026-03-14. Stale investigation from Feb 18. Root cause (no minimum score gate) is addressed by CTO-20260219-002 (QG-001). SDK-200 is old code — not worth retroactive investigation.

proposals.title: Add minimum score gate (≥80) before auto-approval
proposals.verification_notes: IMPLEMENTED 2026-03-14. Added MIN_SCORE_GATE=80 module-level constant in orchestrate-agents-v2.ts. Gate applied at both main task and sub-task approval checks. Tasks with priority='critical' bypass the gate (CEO override). Scores below 80 downgraded from APPROVED to REJECTED with score-gate summary.

proposals.title: Monitor for low-score patterns in future sprints
proposals.verification_notes: Will be addressed as part of QG-001 implementation — add score < 50 alert to post-sprint analysis alongside the threshold gate.

proposals.title: Implement approved complexity validation (CTO-20260219-002)
proposals.verification_notes: CLOSED 2026-03-14. Duplicate of CTO-20260219-002. Use that proposal.

proposals.title: Check OpenClaw version — upgrade if newer than current
proposals.verification_notes: Quick check scheduled for 2026-03-14. Verify current installed version, check for newer releases, review changelog for relevant fixes.

proposals.title: Investigate CMO/Manus AI connectivity
proposals.verification_notes: CLOSED 2026-03-13. CMO confirmed as Manus-only (external, not x402). CMO wallet deactivated (is_active=false). CMO process not running in PM2 by design. No fix needed — architecture is intentional.

proposals.title: [CONSOLIDATED] Stateful Pattern Detection — 8 proposals merged
proposals.verification_notes: CONSOLIDATED 2026-03-14. All 8 proposals addressed the same root issue: MiniMax failing on stateful test patterns. Replaced by two sprint tasks: SP-001 (stateful keyword pre-screening + route to Claude) and SP-002 (max-retry auto-skip after 5 attempts → CEO queue). See sprints/stateful-pattern-2026-03-14.json.
